task: Harden context-orchestrator startup against empty/non-JSON OpenAI-compatible proxy responses
edits: Updated context-orchestrator/src/services/openai.ts to parse either text() or json() response bodies and produce clearer errors for empty/non-JSON proxy responses.
Updated context-orchestrator/src/main.ts so semantic bootstrap failures log a warning and do not crash MCP server startup.
Extended context-orchestrator/tests/openai.test.ts with empty-body and non-JSON regressions.
outcome: The orchestrator should now keep starting even if Antigravity returns malformed or empty JSON during startup indexing.
